required_fields.source_coordinate: same scalar source s used for dE_top/ds

acceptance_schema.required_status: bounded-support or exact-support until retained-route gate passes

actual_current_surface_status: open / same-source WZ response certificate gate not passed
exact_next_action: Produce same-source W/Z mass-response rows, run the W/Z response certificate builder, then rerun this gate; or derive the sector-overlap/canonical-Higgs identity before treating any gauge-normalized ratio as physical y_t evidence.
proposal_allowed_reason: No valid same-source W/Z response certificate exists, and identity gates remain open.

slope_without_identity.name: slopes without sector identity still read y_t * k_top/k_gauge
slope_without_identity.rejection: real W/Z slopes are support only until sector-overlap and Higgs identity pass

static_algebra.name: static EW algebra is not source response
static_algebra.rejection: supplies dM_W/dh after canonical H is assumed, not dM_W/ds

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat static dM_W/dh or observed W/Z masses as dM_W/ds evidence
does not set kappa_s = 1 or k_top = k_gauge
does not use H_unit matrix-element readout or yt_ward_identity
does not use observed top mass, observed y_t, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, c2 = 1, or Z_match = 1
verdict: The future same-source W/Z response route now has an executable certificate gate.  Current PR #230 does not pass it: no W/Z mass-response certificate exists; the certificate builder records that same-source W/Z rows are absent.  Static EW gauge-mass algebra is not a dM_W/ds measurement, and even real same-source W/Z slopes would remain support-only until sector-overlap and canonical-Higgs identity certificates pass.
